name: Mrs Fields' Apple Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Fresh apple, peeled and finely chopped (1 medium apple)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, salt, baking soda, cinnamon, ground cloves, and lemon zest. Mix well and set aside.
3. Cream sugar and butter together in a large bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg, applesauce, and honey to the mixture and beat at medium speed until smooth.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture, fresh apple, and raisins to the batter, blending at low speed until just combined.
6. The dough will be quite soft. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, spacing cookies about 1 1/2 inches apart.
7. If desired, sprinkle a small amount of oats on top of each cookie.
8. Bake for 23-25 minutes or until the bottoms are golden brown.
